title: Harvey & Mason Christmas Time Box 10 Recyclable Family Christmas Crackers Red & White Robin Wreath & Tree
features: CHRISTMAS WITH A BANG: With novelty gifts, hats, mottos & snaps these family crackers will start your Christmas Dinner with a Bang! Each cracker will contain a novelty gift such as a puzzle, puppet or craft kit
FESTIVE DESIGNS: These crackers come in white & red with a robin wreath & Xmas tree design, finished with attractive gold ribbon. A great addition to your dinner table this Christmas.
IDEAL FOR CHRISTMAS CELEBRATIONS: Pack of 10 family Christmas crackers, can be placed around your Christmas dinner table or used for a Christmas Party!
ENJOY A SUSTAINABLE CHRISTMAS: These crackers are designed with the environment in mind, crafted without single-use plastic materials & are fully recyclable
description: Christmas Crackers are a traditional part of the Christmas festivities. This box of 10 family Xmas Crackers come in white & red with a robin wreath & Xmas tree design, finished with attractive gold ribbon. A great addition to your dinner table this Christmas. Crackers contents include a hat, joke, snap and a special gift including a sudoku puzzle or finger puppet. Designed with the environment in mind, crafted without single-use plastic materials, glitter & plastic decorations & are fully recyclable. Approx Sizing: Crackers each measure 300 x 50mm
